creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
eadler      2012-05-15 01:36:05 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/zfstools    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  ZFSTools is an OpenSolaris-like and compatible auto snapshotting
  script, which also supports auto snapshotting mysql databases.
  
  PR:             ports/167898
  Submitted by:   "Bryan Drewery" <bryan@shatow.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1403    +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +22 -0     ports/sysutils/zfstools/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/sysutils/zfstools/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/sysutils/zfstools/pkg-descr (new)
